name: stockyard-idlekill
description: Request watchdog middleware. Kill LLM requests exceeding time, token, or cost limits. Stop agent loops, hanging streams, and runaway completions.

tools.name: idlekill_stats
tools.description: Get watchdog statistics: total monitored, killed, reasons for kills.

tools.name: idlekill_active
tools.description: List currently active LLM requests being monitored.

tools.name: idlekill_recent_kills
tools.description: List recently killed requests with reasons.

tools.name: idlekill_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the IdleKill proxy is running and healthy.
